title: FOOD PANTRY AND CLOTHING CLOSET - 211info
text: ST VINCENT DE PAUL LEBANON CONFERENCE FOOD PANTRY AND CLOTHING CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a food pantry, providing a 3 day supply of food. Also has a rotating supply of clothing, shoes, furniture, appliances, and other household goods supplied by donations. Food, clothing items, and household items accepted for donation. 100 Main Street Lebanon, OR 97355 Eligibility: Must meet federal poverty guidelines Hours: Wednesday 9am-11am and 11:30am-3pm Email (541) 258-5405 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 258-5405 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Pantry: Walk in or call for more information Donations: Call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of address and past due bills LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Pantry and Clothing Closet: Zip code 97355 Donations: Linn County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the rear parking lot of St. Edward's Church Services: Clothing Donation Programs Electronics/Small Appliance Donation Programs Food Donation Programs Food Pantries Furniture Furniture/Home Furnishings Donation Programs General Clothing Provision Kitchenware Kitchenware Donation Programs Small Kitchen Appliances Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST VINCENT DE PAUL LEBANON CONFERENCE
